coupon.source_phrase_block: Pass is good for the Franklin Park Zoo in Boston or the Stone Zoo in Stoneham, MA. Admits 6 people at $9.00 per adult and $6.00 per child. Children 2 years and younger are free. Pass can only be used for daytime admission. They can't be used for Stone Zoo Zoolights or Franklin Park Zoo Boston Lights. Visit museum website for more information. $('.passinfo .details').on('click', function(e) { e.preventDefault(); var $this = $(this); var $collapse = $this.closest('.collapse-group').find('.collapse'); $collapse.collapse('toggle'); });
